text: Reconcile statement evidence to existing canonical transactions without duplication or silent guessing. Evidence: direct — the owner requires notification-derived transactions to be confirmed by monthly statements, statement-only events to be created once, absent events to be reported, and ambiguity to require review; workflows UC-LEDGER-014, UC-LEDGER-015, and UC-LEDGER-016.
target: Every statement evidence record has an observable deterministic, owner-confirmed, statement-only, ambiguous, absent-from-scope, or exception outcome with append-only reason/history; no active evidence record confirms more than one canonical transaction and no match silently creates a duplicate.
